name: Pause menu - gamepad golden path
description: Open the pause menu via TogglePause, confirm it is the active screen, drive one gamepad nav, and confirm focus sits on a volume row's inner AnalogSlider (named VolumeSlider). Green since 2026-06-09: WBP_VolumeSlider is focusable with its own DesiredFocusWidget pointed at the inner slider, so the engine's UUserWidget focus relay (UserWidget.cpp NativeOnFocusReceived) forwards the router's desired-target focus from the wrapper row to the real slider. If this spec goes red again, either the pause screen's DesiredFocusWidget no longer targets a slider row, or the row widget lost bIsFocusable / its relay target - the exact nav-rot this layer exists to catch.

steps.note: deterministic since the simulate_nav inactive-input fix (2026-06-09)
focus must sit on a row's inner AnalogSlider (all rows name it VolumeSlider); stackContains pins the screen
